title: crotalaria lukomae
intro: Crotalaria lukomae, also known as Lukoma's rattlebox, is a plant species in the legume family, Fabaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Crotalaria lukomae include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic to aid in the treatment of urinary issues. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or paste, and is also used in the form of a topical cream or ointment.
